list.title: Batch List
list.description: Check the status and results of created batches at a glance.
list.empty: There are no batches to display.
list.emptyFiltered: There are no batches in {{status}} status.

summary.lastRefreshed: Last refreshed {{time}} · auto refresh every 2 min
summary.lastRefreshedPending: Last refresh pending · auto refresh every 2 min

create.title: Create New Batch
create.pageDescription: Prepare the batch setup and first prompt together before submission.
create.batchInfoDescription: Set the target model and name for the batch.
create.stepBatchSetupDescription: Choose the target model and give this batch a recognizable name.
create.stepFirstPromptDescription: Compose the first prompt and gather any supporting context.
create.batchLabelPlaceholder: Enter a name to identify the batch (auto-generated if empty)
create.firstPromptDescription: Enter the first prompt to include in the batch.
create.userPromptPlaceholder: Enter the request content to send to the AI
create.optionalSystemInstructionDescription: Add extra guidance only when the first prompt needs stable framing.
create.supplementaryInputsDescription: Group imports and file attachments as supporting context for text prompts.
create.referenceMediaSectionDescription: Edit prompts reveal the source media area when it becomes relevant.
create.summaryDescription: Track the current setup state without scrolling back through the form.
create.validationReadyDescription: Model selection and prompt input are complete.
create.validationAttachmentsPending: Wait for attachment processing to finish

notes.systemInstructionPresent: Optional system instruction is already included.
notes.referenceMediaAdded: Reference media has been prepared for the edit flow.
notes.referenceMediaMissing: Edit flow selected. Add reference media when available.
notes.referenceMediaNotRequired: Reference media is not required for this prompt type.

detail.descriptionDraft: Review batch metadata and manage prompts before submission.
detail.descriptionInProgress: Monitor batch progress and review each prompt's execution state.
detail.descriptionCompleted: Review prompt results, failures, and batch-level issues in one place.
detail.descriptionFailed: Inspect batch-wide errors and prompt execution details before retrying.
detail.workspaceDescriptionDraft: Manage the prompt list and compose a new prompt side by side.
detail.workspaceDescriptionRuntime: Check prompt status before expanding each section.
detail.listDescription: Prioritized summary of prompts included in this batch.
detail.noPromptsHelper: Add the first prompt from the composer to prepare this batch for submission.
detail.addPromptDescription: Add a new prompt to the batch.
detail.composerHelper: Draft batches keep the list and composer visible together so you can refine prompts without leaving the page.
detail.previewEmpty: Your prompt preview will appear here after you start writing.
detail.resultUnavailable: No result is available for this prompt yet.
detail.noContext: No attachments or imported context were included.
detail.deleteBatchConfirm: Delete this batch? This action cannot be undone.
detail.deleteBatchSuccess: The batch has been deleted. This action cannot be undone.

alerts.stillFailed: {{count}} prompts are still in failed status.
alerts.none: There are no prompts to resync.
alerts.error: An error occurred while resyncing prompts.
